input.brand_type: Monthly print magazine — architecture and urban design
input.goal: Grow to 5,000 engaged followers, drive website subscriptions
input.resource: One staff member part-time on social

test_cases.notes: Platform fit assessment honest about LinkedIn's content culture bias. Content approach specific to LinkedIn mechanics. Distinctive angle section answers the 'why follow this account' question. Key risk is specific and actionable.

input.brand_type: Investigative podcast — financial crime and corruption
input.goal: Build audience and drive podcast listens

test_cases.notes: TikTok entry strategy correctly identifies the format-mismatch risk for audio-first content. Distinctive angle section honestly notes that investigation-style TikTok is growing but competitive. 90-day targets realistic for zero base.

input.brand_type: Independent documentary filmmaker — social and political subjects
input.goal: Re-engage existing audience, build production community

test_cases.notes: Reset strategy correctly shifts content mix toward behind-the-scenes and process content. Engagement-rate target more useful than follower target for this situation. Algorithm note about Instagram's Reels prioritisation included.
